hero.subtitle: Deploy a professional-grade Discord presence in minutes. Modular, self-hosted, and built for communities that demand more.

features.label: Capabilities
features.title: Everything your server needs
features.subtitle: A modular toolkit designed for communities that demand reliability, flexibility, and control.

automation.title: Automation Rules
automation.description: Create complex event-driven workflows without code. If-this-then-that triggers with 23 event types and 10 action types.

music.title: Music System
music.description: High-fidelity audio streaming with multi-platform support. Queue management, DJ controls, and library mode.

tempVoice.title: TempVoice
tempVoice.description: Dynamic voice channel management. Auto-creation with custom naming templates, permissions, and cleanup.

logs.title: Activity Logs
logs.description: Full audit trail of every automation execution. Search, filter, and debug your rules with detailed logs.

webhooks.title: Webhooks & API
webhooks.description: Send data to external services with HTTP webhooks. Custom headers, body templates, and variable interpolation.

dashboard.title: Real-time Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage everything from a sleek web dashboard. Analytics, configuration, and monitoring in one place.

ctaSection.title: Ready to upgrade your community?
ctaSection.subtitle: Get started in minutes with zero configuration. Self-hosted, open-source, and completely free.
